summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of complete Paint Shop rebuild. All 11 features tested - all PASS. Fixed Save Design API endpoint mismatch (frontend used underscore, backend uses hyphen). All real-time visual customization features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TruckCanvas component correctly uses mix-blend-mode: multiply for color overlay - implementation is clean
All data-testid attributes present for key elements (truck-canvas, color overlays, tabs)
Color selection is truly instant with no useEffect delays
Background isolation working - page backgrounds remain dark regardless of color selection
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/PaintShop.jsx - Fixed saveDesign() to use api.saveTruckDesign() and proper payload format
/app/frontend/src/pages/PaintShop.jsx - Fixed loadDesign() to use api.getLatestTruckDesign() with proper field mapping
seed_data_creation: Created test design 'TEST TRUCK SAVE' to verify save functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paint Shop complete rebuild verified working. All customization features functional with instant updates.

6_Truck_Model_Selection.details: All 6 models (Classic Step Van, Modern Sprinter Van, Large Box Truck, Compact City Truck, Retro Airstream, Open-Air Trailer) clickable and update preview instantly

7_Color_Palettes.details: All 7 palettes (Classic Fleet, Copper & Steel, Street Food, Coastal, Luxury, Neon City, Custom) present and switchable

Color_Selection_Instant.details: Clicking color swatches updates truck preview with color overlay (mix-blend-mode: multiply) instantly - no lag

7_Finish_Types.details: All 7 finishes (Matte, Gloss, Metallic, Chrome, Enamel, Satin, Pearl) apply CSS filters correctly. Gloss/Metallic/Chrome/Satin/Pearl have overlay effects

Two_Tone_Paint.details: Toggle enables secondary color selection and 7 split patterns (Horizontal Split, Forward Diagonal, Rear Diagonal, Racing Stripe, Chevron, Lower Accent, Hood & Roof). Secondary overlay renders on truck

Wrap_Patterns.details: 9 wrap patterns (No Wrap, Horizontal Stripes, Diagonal Stripes, Carbon Fiber, Polka Dots, Hex Grid, Chevrons, Brushed Metal, Camo) all apply CSS overlays with opacity control

Business_Name_Lettering.details: Text input updates truck preview in real-time. 5 font styles, 8 text colors, size slider, and outline options (None, Thin, Bold) all functional

Logo_Upload.details: File input accepts PNG, SVG, WebP (max 5MB). Upload area present with proper instructions

Accessories.details: All 4 accessories toggleable and visible on truck: Awning (solid/striped/scalloped), LED Underglow (color picker), Roof Signage (illuminated option), Racing Stripe (thin/medium/bold)

Save_Design.details: FIXED: Was failing due to API endpoint mismatch. Now correctly calls /api/truck-designs with proper payload. Success toast 'Design saved successfully!' confirmed

Background_Integrity.details: Page backgrounds remain dark (#1a1a2e, #0f0f14, #111118). Color selection properly scoped to truck preview container only

bug_fixed.issue: Save Design was failing with 'Failed to save design' error
bug_fixed.root_cause: Frontend PaintShop.jsx was calling api.post('/truck_designs', {truck_state: ...}) but backend endpoint is /api/truck-designs (hyphen not underscore) and expects different payload structure
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Updated saveDesign() to use api.saveTruckDesign() method which calls correct endpoint. Updated payload to match backend TruckDesignCreate schema (primary_color, accent_color, finish_type, business_name, base_model, etc.). Also fixed loadDesign() to properly map backend response fields to truckState
